changelog: 50 NEW Moods & Themes rows: Movies Everyone Should Watch Once, Movies That Feel Like A Dream, Movies Based On Video Games / Comics / Mythology / Urban Legends, Movies That Predicted The Future, Best Villains / Anti-Heroes / Monologues, Movies About Obsession / Addiction / AI Gone Wrong / Parallel Universes / Memory Loss / Heists / Cults / Isolation / Space / End Of World / Virtual Reality / Fame / Greed / Loneliness / Fatherhood / Motherhood / Hope / Redemption / Philosophy / 80s / 90s / 2000s — and 20+ more.

On-launch first-paint fix: pack-extra themes now load their movie matches automatically when the remote pack arrives, so you see real posters on the very first time you open Moods & Themes after the OTA install (no more 'Curating…' empty state on first launch).
All v1.44.54 features still in place (back-press scroll preservation, hot-patch theme pack).
